## Summary

Describe the purpose of this pull request.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature or tool
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] SEO or metadata update
- [ ] Dependency or vendor update
- [ ] Refactoring without behavior change
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and minimal.
- [ ] I did not change website design unless required.
- [ ] I did not change tool behavior unless documented.
- [ ] I updated generated files when required.
- [ ] I checked links and metadata affected by this change.
- [ ] I ran `npm run validate` or explained why it was not applicable.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` if SEO, routes, generated pages, sitemap, or robots output changed.

## Testing Notes

Describe what was tested and include commands or pages checked.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots if the user interface is affected.
